reviews.review_text: Park is closed. Being redeveloped. Will no longer cater for caravanners.
It's no longer a caravan park
Its been turned into over 65s accommodation, lovely surroundings, but no garage and no storage, going price $385 pw,not for me
LOL....Don't judge people by their looks....We all have stories to tell....great community spirit stick together stay strong.

I've lived here for over 20years it hopeless since previous owner bob Purcell had it nothing gets done something wrong with you or ya place no-one around to help or fix it ya got to do everything yourself
